name: brightness-pilot
title: Brightness Pilot
description: Adjusts brightness levels for all connected monitors
author: giovacalle

commands.name: index
commands.title: Show Monitors
commands.description: Show a list of all connected monitors with brightness controls

commands.name: menubar
commands.title: Brightness Status
commands.description: Show brightness status in the menu bar

commands.name: set-all
commands.title: Set All Brightness
commands.description: Set brightness for all monitors at once

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
